overview: Sree Dattha Group of Institutions (SDGI), located on Nagarjuna Sagar Road in Sheriguda, Ibrahimpatnam, Greater Hyderabad, Telangana, is a premier multi-disciplinary group of educational institutions established in 2001. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH) and approved by AICTE, it incorporates specialized wings including the Sree Dattha Institute of Engineering and Science (SDES). The institutions are highly recognized for their expansive integrated campus, focus on trending technologies, technical career skill integrations (such as SAP International Certifications), and a structured industry-driven placement ecosystem.
accreditation: Accredited by National Board of Accreditation (NBA); Approved by AICTE; Affiliated with JNTUH.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Flagship Programs (CSE, AI & ML, Data Science, CSIT)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹70,000 – ₹95,000 per year. Total course fee ranges from ₹2.80 Lakhs to ₹3.80 Lakhs.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Core Programs (ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Civil)

placements.totalOffers: 924+ job offers with 704+ students successfully placed during the 2025 placement drive
placements.companiesVisited: HCL, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Cognizant, Capgemini, Wipro, Reliance Industries, Schneider Electric, Medvarsity
placements.internshipHighlights: 50% students in core branches secure internships with corporate partners like Reliance Industries; students often pursue specialized certifications like SAP.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily administered via the state-level counseling processes based on rankings in TS EAPCET (for B.Tech), TS ICET (for MBA), and TS PGECET/GATE (for M.Tech). Direct management quota options are available according to JNTUH / State Council norms.
admissions.importantDates: Schedules correspond dynamically to the official timelines issued by Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and JNTUH.

campus.specialNote: Hostels feature solar water heating infrastructure, hygiene/maintenance services, and basic laundry configurations.

hostelFees.SingleSharing: ₹60,000 per year (Total Annual Cost with amenities up to ₹85,000)
hostelFees.DoubleSharing: ₹40,000 per year (Total Annual Cost with amenities up to ₹65,000)
hostelFees.TripleOrFourSharing: ₹30,000 – ₹50,000 per year (Total Annual Cost with amenities up to ₹55,000)

contact.address: Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions, Nagarjuna Sagar Road, Sheriguda, Ibrahimpatnam, Ranga Reddy District, Telangana – 501510, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Fee exemptions mapped directly via TS EAPCET allocations and standardized state parameters.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition coverage for students qualifying under government-sponsored absolute merit thresholds.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Concessions evaluated based on criteria defined for specific entry streams or management quotas.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible backward classes, SC/ST, and EWS candidates receive institutional tuition coverage via the TS ePASS scholarship scheme.
